The '''''Marl''-class heavy freighter''' was created by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The design was a blocky drive connected to a long series of detachable storage pods. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was headed up by a narrow habitation compartment.

''[[Tinmolok]]'' was a ''Marl''-class heavy freighter used in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] first by the [[Peace Brigade]] and later by the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-02-XX -->''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''
